title: Rust and Revival
description: Rust and Revival is modpack centered around and a combination of arcane/chthonic magic and malformed/jury-rigged machines. Explore new worlds and dive into the depths of ancient magic, or build a factory of impossible biomechanical machines.
body:
![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6833eaf1cc29221d37f77450a910684da5a68628.png)


**Welcome to Rust and Revival**

Rust and Revival combines arcane and chthonic magic with makeshift machinery, inviting players to explore ancient worlds and construct biomechanical horrors.

**Some features:** 

- Beans Backpacks
- Beneath the Wetlands 
- Better Nether
- Valkyrien Skies (Eureka and Clockwork)
- Antique Atlas 4
- Create
- Effective
- Farmers delight
- Fresh animations
- Hybrid aquatic
- Naturalist 
- Lootr
- Manic
- Spectrum
- NEEPMeat
- Simply Swords 
- Simple voice chat
- Presence-Footsteps
- YUNG's Cave Biomes 
- Zenith



_(Please ignore a couple of the gallery images, I was obligated to put them in by a friend)_
